title: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
notes: Applied the recommended fix to the element

code.title: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

html.after:
<!-- Fix applied to .nav-banner-wrap -->
<!-- Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination -->
<aside role="complementary" class="nav-banner-wrap">

code.what_changed: Applied the recommended fix to the affected element.

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination'. Ensure landmarks are unique This addresses a moderate barrier and improves conformance with WCAG best practices.
highlights: Resolves a moderate issue mapped to WCAG best practice
